$comment: C11/C23 6.4.4.4 / D-FFI-STDDEF-WCHAR-PE-WIDTH: sizeof(L'x') = the wchar_t width, FORMAT-keyed — pe64 → 2 (UTF-16 unit), elf/mach-o → 4 (POSIX). Per-target exitCode overrides the manifest default: the ONE source witnesses the single wchar core resolution across every target. This is the char analog of wchar_platform_width (the string form). The release arm returns the same per target.
